name: production-agent-skills
description: Production-tested agent skills for backend (Kotlin/Micronaut), frontend (React/Tailwind), design systems, content writing, and startup workflows.
author: spartan-hieuvo

skills.name: api-endpoint-creator
skills.description: Scaffold a complete RPC-style endpoint: Controller → Manager → Repository → Tests

skills.name: backend-api-design
skills.description: Design RPC-style APIs with layered architecture (Controller → Manager → Repository)

skills.name: kotlin-best-practices
skills.description: Kotlin coding standards — null safety, Either error handling, Exposed ORM, coroutines, transactions

skills.name: database-patterns
skills.description: Database schema design, migrations, soft deletes, and Exposed ORM patterns

skills.name: database-table-creator
skills.description: Create database table with full Kotlin sync (SQL → Table → Entity → Repository → Tests)

skills.name: testing-strategies
skills.description: Testing patterns for Micronaut/Kotlin: repository tests, integration tests, test data builders

skills.name: security-checklist
skills.description: Security audit for Micronaut/Kotlin backend — auth, authz, input validation, IDOR, secrets

skills.name: design-intelligence
skills.description: Bootstrap a design system: tokens, typography, spacing, Tailwind config, CSS variables

skills.name: design-workflow
skills.description: Anti-AI-generic design guidelines — make UI that doesn't look AI-generated

skills.name: browser-qa
skills.description: Run real browser QA with Playwright — find bugs users would find

skills.name: web-to-prd
skills.description: Scan a live web app, extract features, generate PRD with epics/stories/priorities

skills.name: article-writing
skills.description: Write blog posts, guides, and tutorials that sound human, not AI

skills.name: content-engine
skills.description: Turn one idea into platform-native content for X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, newsletters

skills.name: investor-outreach
skills.description: Draft cold emails, warm intro blurbs, and follow-ups for investors

skills.name: investor-materials
skills.description: Create pitch decks, one-pagers, memos, and financial models

npxSkills.description: Install via npx skills CLI (auto-detects agent platform)

manual.description: Clone the repo and copy skills to your project's .claude/skills/ directory
